g.text: Closed-set aggregate accuracy; labels show absolute gain
More task views move both R1 siblings toward high-confidence attribution
CML and MTCR restore near-complete binary detection
MATH remains a single-seed stress test

polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #F6D7BF; fill-opacity: 0.65;
